overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a fenced sidewalk toward a dense futuristic downtown intersection. The character passes several pedestrians while approaching towering corporate buildings with holographic advertisements and neon signage under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced sidewalk alongside elevated rail and city street

events.description: pedestrian in white jacket passes very close to camera, temporarily blocking view
pedestrian in tank top passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk between the chain-link fence and the street

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket walking toward camera, passes within close proximity
man in tank top walking toward camera, passes by closely

entered.detail: tall chain-link fence with barbed wire topping running along the left side of the sidewalk
elevated highway or monorail structure visible behind the fence
tall futuristic skyscraper with red medical cross signage near the top
modern blue and white commercial building with large windows
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with visible seams
short black and yellow bollards lining the edge between sidewalk and street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk enclosed by a chain-link fence on the left and a city street on the right. The camera follows the character walking toward two oncoming pedestrians who pass very close by, temporarily obscuring the view. In the distance, a towering medical center skyscraper dominates the skyline under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with corporate plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the intersection, gaining on two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: person in teal hoodie walking ahead in same direction, gradually getting closer

entered.detail: single palm tree visible in the center distance near the intersection
glowing holographic billboards and signage on the buildings ahead becoming more visible

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the fenced sidewalk as the scene gradually opens up approaching the intersection. The medical center tower and surrounding corporate buildings grow larger in the frame, while holographic advertisements and a distant palm tree become visible. The character gains on a pedestrian in a teal hoodie walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with medical center plaza

events.description: transitioning from narrow sidewalk to wider intersection crosswalk area with marked lines
passing two pedestrians on the left while entering the crosswalk zone

agents.ego_description: walking through the crosswalk area, overtaking two pedestrians and approaching the medical center entrance

notable_agents.action: person in teal hoodie being passed on the left side of the sidewalk
woman in dress walking slowly, being overtaken by the camera

entered.detail: yellow and white striped crosswalk markings becoming prominent on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection crosswalk, passing two pedestrians on the left as the medical center tower looms large directly ahead. The ground transitions to marked crosswalk lines while the chain-link fence continues along the left. The scene opens into a spacious plaza area with the corporate buildings now very close and detailed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a restricted city sidewalk that gradually opens into a sprawling, high-tech corporate intersection. It begins on a narrow path enclosed by a chain-link fence, following a character who passes oncoming pedestrians while a towering medical center skyscraper looms in the distance under an overcast sky. As the character advances, the environment expands and the corporate skyline grows larger in the frame, revealing holographic advertisements and a distant palm tree. The scene then shifts as the character catches up to a pedestrian in a teal hoodie and enters a wide crosswalk, where the ground transitions to marked lines. Finally, the camera moves into a spacious plaza area, bringing the detailed facades of the massive corporate buildings into close view.
